creator: acm@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello, I have updated gvm ports to latest versions. Take a look at:

https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=fde0b606556b9deb1dd043cdd07d45145d33720b

If I'm not mistaken new versions include support for py-paho-mqtt 1.x and 2.x. Feel free to open this PR if it is not fixed.
